scripts.biome:check: biome check apps packages tests .github .devcontainer biome.json package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml lefthook.yml
scripts.biome:fix: biome check --write apps packages tests .github .devcontainer biome.json package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml lefthook.yml
scripts.db:reset:docker: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.scale.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.scale.yml up -d postgres redis && sleep 10 && DATABASE_URL="postgresql://app:chifoumi_dev@localhost:5432/chifoumi" pnpm --filter @chifoumi/db migrate:deploy && DATABASE_URL="postgresql://app:chifoumi_dev@localhost:5432/chifoumi" pnpm db:seed
